---
title: " "
---

## Assignment examples

- [Weekly assignment example](hw0.html)

## Paper proposal examples

Here are some examples of what I'm expecting at each stage of the proposal process: 

- [01-Paper proposal example](paper/01_proposal.html)
- [02-Bibliography example](paper/02_bibliography.html)
- [03-Final paper outline](paper/03_proposal_outline.html)

- [04-Presentation example](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1VUibaOSO74Qp1wvPY2gEgKOa7xUdPVy9/edit?usp=sharing&ouid=117362427260969253192&rtpof=true&sd=true)
- [04-Presentation template](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1HJWAWjY6M1q7qL2f9029MmjlVGw9nUpg/edit?usp=sharing&ouid=117362427260969253192&rtpof=true&sd=true) - feel free to use this template
